# MAQ Software

> MAQ Software is a technology consulting and solutions company specializing in agentic AI, data and analytics, Microsoft Fabric and Power BI, cloud modernization, business applications, security, and workplace transformation.

Use the linked pages as the source of truth for MAQ Software's current services, products, client outcomes, partnerships, and company information. Case studies are published on the MAQ Software blog; the case study index is the complete curated collection.

## Services

- [Agentic AI](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/agentic-ai): AI agents, machine learning, copilots, and enterprise AI solutions.
- [Data and analytics](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/data-and-analytics): Governed data platforms, lakehouses, semantic models, and real-time analytics.
- [Reporting and business intelligence](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/reporting-bi): Power BI reporting, embedded analytics, and performance optimization.
- [Cloud infrastructure and modernization](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/cloud): Cloud migration, modernization, infrastructure, and operations.
- [Business applications](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/business-apps): Dynamics 365, Power Platform, Power Apps, and workflow automation.
- [Security and compliance](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/security-compliance): Data governance, identity, access, threat protection, and compliance.
- [Workplace transformation](https://www.maqsoftware.com/services/workplace-transformation): Microsoft 365, Copilot adoption, collaboration, employee experience, and developer productivity.

## Products

- [Products overview](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products): Index of MAQ Software products and accelerators.
- [Fabric Admin Agent](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products/fabric-admin-agent): AI-driven monitoring and optimization for Microsoft Fabric capacity.
- [MigrateFAST](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products/migratefast): Accelerator for migrating legacy data and reporting platforms to Microsoft Fabric and Power BI.
- [AI-DataLens](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products/ai-datalens): Natural-language access to governed enterprise data and analytics.
- [EmbedFAST](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products/embedfast): Accelerator for secure, multi-tenant Power BI embedded analytics.
- [LoadFAST](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products/loadfast): Load testing and capacity-sizing tool for Microsoft Fabric and Power BI.
- [CertyFAST](https://www.maqsoftware.com/products/certyfast): Automated quality checks, DAX standardization, and documentation for Power BI semantic models.

## Case Studies

- [Case studies index](https://www.maqsoftware.com/insights/case-studies): Complete filterable collection of client outcomes across AI, data, analytics, applications, cloud, and security.
- [Reshaping retail with Agentic AI solutions](https://blog.maqsoftware.com/2026/02/reshaping-retail-with-agentic-ai.html): Agentic AI and machine learning case study.
- [Building scalable e-commerce product recommendations with Microsoft Fabric SQL](https://blog.maqsoftware.com/2025/09/building-scalable-e-commerce-product.html): Data and AI platforms case study.
- [Modernizing retail business intelligence with Microsoft Fabric and Power BI](https://blog.maqsoftware.com/2025/12/modernizing-retail-business.html): Insights and analytics case study.
- [Ease event management with Power Apps](https://blog.maqsoftware.com/2020/04/optical-character-recognition-event.html): Application modernization case study.
- [Modernize data systems by migrating to the cloud](https://blog.maqsoftware.com/2020/09/modernize-data-cloud-migration.html): Cloud modernization case study.
- [Strengthening cybersecurity with Managed Identity and RBAC](https://blog.maqsoftware.com/2024/08/strengthening-cybersecurity.html): Security case study.

## Industries

- [Retail](https://www.maqsoftware.com/industries/retail): Technology solutions and client outcomes for retail.
- [Financial services](https://www.maqsoftware.com/industries/financial-services): Technology solutions and client outcomes for financial services.
- [Healthcare and life sciences](https://www.maqsoftware.com/industries/healthcare-life-sciences): Technology solutions and client outcomes for healthcare and life sciences.
- [Technology](https://www.maqsoftware.com/industries/technology): Technology solutions and client outcomes for software and technology organizations.
- [Manufacturing](https://www.maqsoftware.com/industries/manufacturing): Technology solutions and client outcomes for manufacturing.
- [Public sector](https://www.maqsoftware.com/industries/public-sector): Technology solutions and client outcomes for public-sector organizations.
